title: Tango
blocks: Every week, SOL Hostel comes alive with the sultry beats of tango. The
weekly event was a chance for travelers like me to try their hand at
this passionate and captivating dance. As evening settled, the familiar
strains of tango music filled the air, beckoning everyone to the dance
floor. Rolando, the tango maestro and my roommate, started the dance
with a flourish. His every move told a story, and the hostel's living
room became a theatre.
I was content watching from the sidelines until Charlotte, with her
French grace, extended a invitational hand. With a mixture of hesitation
and excitement, I took her hand. Far from being a proper tangoist, I
learned the basic tango steps from Rolando. The rhythm took over, and we
moved as one. Each step and each turn mirrored the journey I had
embarked on -- uncertain at times, thrilled by others. As the music
ebbed and our dance concluded, I returned to my seat amidst cheers from
the audience. They were no longer just hostel mates but friends who had
become family. The tango night with hostel family created a memory that
would stay with me long after I left SOL Hostel.
In the dance of life, every step counts,
Every turn is a memory, every pause a new chance.
For in the rhythm of tango, I found a tale,
Of journeys, farewells, and friendships that never fail.
